Have a look at the </span><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="cursor-pointer font-body text-sm font-medium leading-6 text-secondary-500 underline transition duration-150 ease-in-out hover:text-secondary-600 focus:text-gray-900 focus:outline-none" href="/blog/release-notes-3.0.0">release notes</a>.</div><div><span class="font-sans text-sm text-gray-800 antialiased">Interested in release notes of other versions of the specification? </span><span class="font-sans text-sm text-gray-800 antialiased">Check <a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="cursor-pointer font-body text-sm font-medium leading-6 text-secondary-500 underline transition duration-150 ease-in-out hover:text-secondary-600 focus:text-gray-900 focus:outline-none" href="https://www.asyncapi.com/blog?tags=Release+Notes">list of release notes</a>.</span></div></div><article class="my-12"><h1 id="asyncapi-specification" class=" my-4 font-heading text-2xl font-semibold tracking-heading text-gray-900 antialiased">AsyncAPI Specification</h1>
<h2 id="attribution" class=" mb-4 mt-6 font-heading text-2xl font-semibold tracking-heading text-gray-900 antialiased">Attribution</h2>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Part of this content has been taken from the great work done by the folks at the <a href="https://openapis.org" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">OpenAPI Initiative</a>.</p>
<h3 id="version-300" class=" mb-4 mt-6 font-heading text-lg font-medium tracking-heading text-gray-900 antialiased">Version 3.0.0</h3>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">The key words &quot;MUST&quot;, &quot;MUST NOT&quot;, &quot;REQUIRED&quot;, &quot;SHALL&quot;, &quot;SHALL NOT&quot;, &quot;SHOULD&quot;, &quot;SHOULD NOT&quot;, &quot;RECOMMENDED&quot;, &quot;MAY&quot;, and &quot;OPTIONAL&quot; in this document are to be interpreted as described in <a href="https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc2119.txt" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">RFC 2119</a>.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">The AsyncAPI Specification is licensed under <a href="https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.html" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">The Apache License, Version 2.0</a>.</p>
<h2 id="introduction" class=" mb-4 mt-6 font-heading text-2xl font-semibold tracking-heading text-gray-900 antialiased">Introduction</h2>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">The AsyncAPI Specification is a project used to describe message-driven APIs in a machine-readable format. It’s protocol-agnostic, so you can use it for APIs that work over any protocol (e.g., AMQP, MQTT, WebSockets, Kafka, STOMP, HTTP, Mercure, etc).</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">The AsyncAPI Specification defines a set of fields that can be used in an AsyncAPI document to describe an <a href="#definitionsApplication" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">application</a>&#x27;s API. The document may reference other files for additional details or shared fields, but it is typically a single, primary document that encapsulates the API description.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">The AsyncAPI document SHOULD describe the operations an <a href="#definitionsApplication" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">application</a> performs. For instance, consider the following AsyncAPI definition snippet:</p>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-yaml rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span style="color:#7edcda">channels:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">userSignedUp:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#797f8c"># ...(redacted for brevity)</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">operations:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">5</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">onUserSignedUp:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">6</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">action:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">receive</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">7</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">channel:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">8</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">$ref:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;#/channels/userSignedUp&quot;</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">It means that the <a href="#definitionsApplication" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">application</a> will receive messages from  the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">userSignedUp</code> <a href="#definitionsChannel" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">channel</a>.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">The AsyncAPI specification does not assume any kind of software topology, architecture or pattern.</strong> Therefore, a server MAY be a message broker, a web server or any other kind of computer program capable of sending and/or receiving data. However, AsyncAPI offers a mechanism called &quot;bindings&quot; that aims to help with more specific information about the protocol.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">It&#x27;s NOT RECOMMENDED to derive a <a href="#definitionsReceiver" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">receiver</a> AsyncAPI document from a <a href="#definitionsSender" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">sender</a> one or vice versa. There are no guarantees that the channel used by an application to receive messages will be the same channel where another application is sending them. Also, certain fields in the document like <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">summary</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">description</code>, and the id of the operation might stop making sense. For instance, given the following receiver snippet:</p>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-yaml rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span style="color:#7edcda">operations:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">onUserSignedUp:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">summary:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">On</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">user</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">signed</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">up.</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">description:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">Event</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">received</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">when</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">a</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">user</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">signed</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">up</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">on</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">the</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">product.</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">5</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">action:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">receive</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">6</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">channel:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">7</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">$ref:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;#/channels/userSignedUp&quot;</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">We can&#x27;t automatically assume that an <em>opposite</em> application exists by simply replacing <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">receive</code> with <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">send</code>:</p>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-yaml rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span style="color:#7edcda">operations:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">onUserSignedUp:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#797f8c"># &lt;-- This doesn&#x27;t make sense now. Should be something like sendUserSignedUp.</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">summary:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">On</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">user</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">signed</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">up.</span><span> </span><span style="color:#797f8c"># &lt;-- This doesn&#x27;t make sense now. Should say something like &quot;Sends a user signed up event&quot;.</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">description:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">Event</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">received</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">when</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">a</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">user</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">signed</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">up</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">on</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">the</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">product.</span><span> </span><span style="color:#797f8c"># &lt;-- This doesn&#x27;t make sense now. Should speak about sending an event, not receiving it.</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">5</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">action:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">send</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">6</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">channel:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">7</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">$ref:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;#/channels/userSignedUp&quot;</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Aside from the issues mentioned above, there may also be infrastructure configuration that is not represented here. For instance, a system may use a read-only channel for receiving messages, a different one for sending them, and an intermediary process that will forward messages from one channel to the other.</p>
<h2 id="definitions" class=" mb-4 mt-6 font-heading text-2xl font-semibold tracking-heading text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="definitions"></a>Definitions</h2>
<h3 id="server" class=" mb-4 mt-6 font-heading text-lg font-medium tracking-heading text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="definitionsServer"></a>Server</h3>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">A server MAY be a message broker that is capable of sending and/or receiving between a <a href="#definitionsSender" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">sender</a> and <a href="#definitionsReceiver" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">receiver</a>. A server MAY be a service with WebSocket API that enables message-driven communication between browser-to-server or server-to-server.</p>
<h3 id="application" class=" mb-4 mt-6 font-heading text-lg font-medium tracking-heading text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="definitionsApplication"></a>Application</h3>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">An application is any kind of computer program or a group of them. It MUST be a <a href="#definitionsSender" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">sender</a>, a <a href="#definitionsReceiver" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">receiver</a>, or both. An application MAY be a microservice, IoT device (sensor), mainframe process, message broker, etc. An application MAY be written in any number of different programming languages as long as they support the selected <a href="#definitionsProtocol" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">protocol</a>. An application MUST also use a protocol supported by the <a href="#definitionsServer" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">server</a> in order to connect and exchange <a href="#definitionsMessage" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">messages</a>.</p>
<h3 id="sender" class=" mb-4 mt-6 font-heading text-lg font-medium tracking-heading text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="definitionsSender"></a>Sender</h3>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">A sender is a type of application, that is sending <a href="#definitionsMessage" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">messages</a> to <a href="#definitionsChannel" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">channels</a>. A sender MAY send to multiple channels depending on the <a href="#definitionsServer" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">server</a>, protocol, and use-case pattern.</p>
<h3 id="receiver" class=" mb-4 mt-6 font-heading text-lg font-medium tracking-heading text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="definitionsReceiver"></a>Receiver</h3>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">A receiver is a type of application that is receiving <a href="#definitionsMessage" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">messages</a> from <a href="#definitionsChannel" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">channels</a>. A receiver MAY receive from multiple channels depending on the <a href="#definitionsServer" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">server</a>, protocol, and the use-case pattern. A receiver MAY forward a received message further without changing it. A receiver MAY act as a consumer and react to the message. A receiver MAY act as a processor that, for example, aggregates multiple messages in one and forwards them.</p>
<h3 id="message" class=" mb-4 mt-6 font-heading text-lg font-medium tracking-heading text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="definitionsMessage"></a>Message</h3>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">A message is the mechanism by which information is exchanged via a channel between <a href="#definitionsServer" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">servers</a> and applications. A message MAY contain a payload and MAY also contain headers. The headers MAY be subdivided into <a href="#definitionsProtocol" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">protocol</a>-defined headers and header properties defined by the application which can act as supporting metadata. The payload contains the data, defined by the application, which MUST be serialized into a format (JSON, XML, Avro, binary, etc.). Since a message is a generic mechanism, it can support multiple interaction patterns such as event, command, request, or response.</p>
<h3 id="channel" class=" mb-4 mt-6 font-heading text-lg font-medium tracking-heading text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="definitionsChannel"></a>Channel</h3>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">A channel is an addressable component, made available by the <a href="#definitionsServer" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">server</a>, for the organization of <a href="#definitionsMessage" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">messages</a>. <a href="#definitionsSender" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Sender</a> applications send messages to channels and <a href="#definitionsReceiver" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">receiver</a> applications receive messages from channels. <a href="#definitionsServer" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Servers</a> MAY support many channel instances, allowing messages with different content to be addressed to different channels. Depending on the <a href="#definitionsServer" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">server</a> implementation, the channel MAY be included in the message via protocol-defined headers.</p>
<h3 id="protocol" class=" mb-4 mt-6 font-heading text-lg font-medium tracking-heading text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="definitionsProtocol"></a>Protocol</h3>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">A protocol is the mechanism (wireline protocol or API) by which <a href="#definitionsMessage" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">messages</a> are exchanged between the application and the <a href="#definitionsChannel" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">channel</a>. Example protocols include, but are not limited to, AMQP, HTTP, JMS, Kafka, Anypoint MQ, MQTT, Solace, STOMP, Mercure, WebSocket, Google Pub/Sub, Pulsar.</p>
<h3 id="bindings" class=" mb-4 mt-6 font-heading text-lg font-medium tracking-heading text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="definitionsBindings"></a>Bindings</h3>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">A &quot;binding&quot; (or &quot;protocol binding&quot;) is a mechanism to define protocol-specific information. Therefore, a protocol binding MUST define protocol-specific information only.</p>
<h2 id="specification" class=" mb-4 mt-6 font-heading text-2xl font-semibold tracking-heading text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="specification"></a>Specification</h2>
<h3 id="format" class=" mb-4 mt-6 font-heading text-lg font-medium tracking-heading text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="format"></a>Format</h3>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">The files describing the message-driven API in accordance with the AsyncAPI Specification are represented as JSON objects and conform to the JSON standards.
YAML, being a superset of JSON, can be used as well to represent a A2S (AsyncAPI Specification) file.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">For example, if a field is said to have an array value, the JSON array representation will be used:</p>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-yaml rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span>{
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>   </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;field&quot;</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">:</span><span> [</span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">...</span><span>]
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span>}</span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">While the API is described using JSON it does not impose a JSON input/output to the API itself.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">All field names in the specification are <strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">case sensitive</strong>.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">The schema exposes two types of fields.
Fixed fields, which have a declared name, and Patterned fields, which declare a regex pattern for the field name.
Patterned fields can have multiple occurrences as long as each has a unique name.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">In order to preserve the ability to round-trip between YAML and JSON formats, YAML version <a href="https://www.yaml.org/spec/1.2/spec.html" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">1.2</a> is recommended along with some additional constraints:</p>
<ul class=" font-normal my-4 ml-4 list-disc font-body text-gray-700 antialiased">
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">Tags MUST be limited to those allowed by the <a href="https://www.yaml.org/spec/1.2/spec.html#id2803231" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">JSON Schema ruleset</a></li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">Keys used in YAML maps MUST be limited to a scalar string, as defined by the YAML Failsafe schema ruleset</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="file-structure" class=" mb-4 mt-6 font-heading text-lg font-medium tracking-heading text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="file-structure"></a>File Structure</h3>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">An AsyncAPI document MAY be made up of a single document or be divided into multiple,
connected parts at the discretion of the author. In the latter case, <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Objects</a> are used.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">It is important to note that everything that is defined in an AsyncAPI document MUST be used by the implemented <a href="#definitionsApplication" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Application</a>, with the exception of the <a href="#componentsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Components Object</a>. Everything that is defined inside the Components Object represents a resource that MAY or MAY NOT be used by the implemented <a href="#definitionsApplication" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Application</a>.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">By convention, the AsyncAPI Specification (A2S) file is named <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">asyncapi.json</code> or <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">asyncapi.yaml</code>.</p>
<h3 id="absolute-urls" class=" mb-4 mt-6 font-heading text-lg font-medium tracking-heading text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="absolute-urls"></a>Absolute URLs</h3>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Unless specified otherwise, all properties that are absolute URLs are defined by <a href="https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc3986#section-4.3" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">RFC3986, section 4.3</a>.</p>
<h3 id="schema" class=" mb-4 mt-6 font-heading text-lg font-medium tracking-heading text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="schema"></a>Schema</h3>
<h4 id="asyncapi-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="A2SObject"></a>AsyncAPI Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This is the root document object for the API specification.
It combines resource listing and API declaration together into one document.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="A2SAsyncAPI"></a>asyncapi</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#A2SVersionString" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">AsyncAPI Version String</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED.</strong> Specifies the AsyncAPI Specification version being used. It can be used by tooling Specifications and clients to interpret the version. The structure shall be <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">major</code>.<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">minor</code>.<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">patch</code>, where <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">patch</code> versions <em>must</em> be compatible with the existing <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">major</code>.<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">minor</code> tooling. Typically patch versions will be introduced to address errors in the documentation, and tooling should typically be compatible with the corresponding <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">major</code>.<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">minor</code> (1.0.*). Patch versions will correspond to patches of this document.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="A2SId"></a>id</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#A2SIdString" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Identifier</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Identifier of the <a href="#definitionsApplication" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">application</a> the AsyncAPI document is defining.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="A2SInfo"></a>info</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#infoObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Info Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED.</strong> Provides metadata about the API. The metadata can be used by the clients if needed.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="A2SServers"></a>servers</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#serversObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Servers Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Provides connection details of servers.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="A2SDefaultContentType"></a>defaultContentType</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#defaultContentTypeString" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Default Content Type</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Default content type to use when encoding/decoding a message&#x27;s payload.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="A2SChannels"></a>channels</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#channelsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Channels Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The channels used by this <a href="#definitionsApplication" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">application</a>.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="A2SOperations"></a>operations</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#operationsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Operations Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The operations this <a href="#definitionsApplication" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">application</a> MUST implement.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="A2SComponents"></a>components</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#componentsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Components Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">An element to hold various reusable objects for the specification. Everything that is defined inside this object represents a resource that MAY or MAY NOT be used in the rest of the document and MAY or MAY NOT be used by the implemented <a href="#definitionsApplication" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Application</a>.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<h4 id="asyncapi-version-string" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="A2SVersionString"></a>AsyncAPI Version String</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">The version string signifies the version of the AsyncAPI Specification that the document complies to.
The format for this string <em>must</em> be <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">major</code>.<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">minor</code>.<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">patch</code>.  The <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">patch</code> <em>may</em> be suffixed by a hyphen and extra alphanumeric characters.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">A <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">major</code>.<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">minor</code> shall be used to designate the AsyncAPI Specification version, and will be considered compatible with the AsyncAPI Specification specified by that <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">major</code>.<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">minor</code> version.
The patch version will not be considered by tooling, making no distinction between <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">1.0.0</code> and <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">1.0.1</code>.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">In subsequent versions of the AsyncAPI Specification, care will be given such that increments of the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">minor</code> version should not interfere with operations of tooling developed to a lower minor version. Thus a hypothetical <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">1.1.0</code> specification should be usable with tooling designed for <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">1.0.0</code>.</p>
<h4 id="identifier" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="A2SIdString"></a>Identifier</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This field represents a unique universal identifier of the <a href="#definitionsApplication" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">application</a> the AsyncAPI document is defining. It must conform to the URI format, according to <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc3986" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">RFC3986</a>.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">It is RECOMMENDED to use a <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc8141" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">URN</a> to globally and uniquely identify the application during long periods of time, even after it becomes unavailable or ceases to exist.</p>
<h5 id="examples" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Examples</h5>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-json rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span>{

<h4 id="info-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="infoObject"></a>Info Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">The object provides metadata about the API.
The metadata can be used by the clients if needed.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-1" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="infoObjectTitle"></a>title</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED.</strong> The title of the application.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="infoObjectVersion"></a>version</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED</strong> Provides the version of the application API (not to be confused with the specification version).</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="infoObjectDescription"></a>description</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A short description of the application. <a href="https://spec.commonmark.org/" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">CommonMark syntax</a> can be used for rich text representation.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="infoObjectTermsOfService"></a>termsOfService</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A URL to the Terms of Service for the API. This MUST be in the form of an absolute URL.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="infoObjectContact"></a>contact</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#contactObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Contact Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The contact information for the exposed API.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="infoObjectLicense"></a>license</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#licenseObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">License Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The license information for the exposed API.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="infoObjectTags"></a>tags</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#tagsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Tags Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A list of tags for application API documentation control. Tags can be used for logical grouping of applications.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="infoObjectExternalDocs"></a>externalDocs</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#externalDocumentationObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">External Documentation Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Additional external documentation of the exposed API.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>

<h4 id="contact-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="contactObject"></a>Contact Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Contact information for the exposed API.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-2" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="contactObjectName"></a>name</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The identifying name of the contact person/organization.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="contactObjectUrl"></a>url</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The URL pointing to the contact information. This MUST be in the form of an absolute URL.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="contactObjectEmail"></a>email</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The email address of the contact person/organization. MUST be in the format of an email address.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>

<h4 id="license-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="licenseObject"></a>License Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">License information for the exposed API.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-3" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="licenseObjectName"></a>name</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED.</strong> The license name used for the API.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="licenseObjectUrl"></a>url</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A URL to the license used for the API. This MUST be in the form of an absolute URL.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<h5 id="license-object-example" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">License Object Example</h5>

              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span>{
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;name&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;Apache 2.0&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;url&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.html&quot;</span><span>

              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span style="color:#7edcda">name:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">Apache</span><span> </span><span style="color:#d8da68">2.0</span><span>

<h4 id="servers-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="serversObject"></a>Servers Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">The Servers Object is a map of <a href="#serverObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Server Objects</a>.</p>
<h5 id="patterned-fields" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Patterned Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Pattern</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="serversObjectServer"></a><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">^[A-Za-z0-9_\-]+$</code></td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#serverObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Server Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The definition of a server this application MAY connect to.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<h5 id="servers-object-example" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Servers Object Example</h5>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-json rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span>{

</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">6</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;protocolVersion&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;0-9-1&quot;</span><span>,

</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">8</span>      {

</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">37</span>  }
