<h4 id="server-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="serverObject"></a>Server Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">An object representing a message broker, a server or any other kind of computer program capable of sending and/or receiving data. This object is used to capture details such as URIs, protocols and security configuration. Variable substitution can be used so that some details, for example usernames and passwords, can be injected by code generation tools.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-4" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="serverObjectHost"></a>host</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED</strong>. The server host name. It MAY include the port. This field supports <a href="#serverObjectVariables" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Server Variables</a>. Variable substitutions will be made when a variable is named in <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">{</code>braces<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">}</code>.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="serverObjectProtocol"></a>protocol</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED</strong>. The protocol this server supports for connection.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="serverObjectProtocolVersion"></a>protocolVersion</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The version of the protocol used for connection. For instance: AMQP <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">0.9.1</code>, HTTP <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">2.0</code>, Kafka <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">1.0.0</code>, etc.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="serverObjectPathname"></a>pathname</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The path to a resource in the host. This field supports <a href="#serverObjectVariables" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Server Variables</a>. Variable substitutions will be made when a variable is named in <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">{</code>braces<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">}</code>.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="serverObjectDescription"></a>description</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">An optional string describing the server. <a href="https://spec.commonmark.org/" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">CommonMark syntax</a> MAY be used for rich text representation.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="serverObjectTitle"></a>title</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A human-friendly title for the server.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="serverObjectSummary"></a>summary</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A short summary of the server.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="serverObjectVariables"></a>variables</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Map[<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code>, <a href="#serverVariableObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Server Variable Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a>]]</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A map between a variable name and its value.  The value is used for substitution in the server&#x27;s <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">host</code> and <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">pathname</code> template.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="serverObjectSecurity"></a>security</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">[<a href="#securitySchemeObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Security Scheme Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a>]</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A declaration of which security schemes can be used with this server. The list of values includes alternative <a href="#securitySchemeObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">security scheme objects</a> that can be used. Only one of the security scheme objects need to be satisfied to authorize a connection or operation.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="serverObjectTags"></a>tags</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#tagsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Tags Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A list of tags for logical grouping and categorization of servers.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="serverObjectExternalDocs"></a>externalDocs</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#externalDocumentationObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">External Documentation Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Additional external documentation for this server.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="serverObjectBindings"></a>bindings</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#serverBindingsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Server Bindings Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A map where the keys describe the name of the protocol and the values describe protocol-specific definitions for the server.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<h5 id="server-object-example" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Server Object Example</h5>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">A single server would be described as:</p>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-json rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span>{
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;host&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;kafka.in.mycompany.com:9092&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;description&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;Production Kafka broker.&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;protocol&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;kafka&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">5</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;protocolVersion&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;3.2&quot;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">6</span>}</span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-yaml rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span style="color:#7edcda">host:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">kafka.in.mycompany.com:9092</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">description:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">Production</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">Kafka</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">broker.</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">protocol:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">kafka</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">protocolVersion:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&#x27;3.2&#x27;</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">An example of a server that has a <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">pathname</code>:</p>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-json rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span>{
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;host&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;rabbitmq.in.mycompany.com:5672&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;pathname&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;/production&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;protocol&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;amqp&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">5</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;description&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;Production RabbitMQ broker (uses the `production` vhost).&quot;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">6</span>}</span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-yaml rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span style="color:#7edcda">host:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">rabbitmq.in.mycompany.com:5672</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">pathname:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">/production</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">protocol:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">amqp</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">description:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">Production</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">RabbitMQ</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">broker</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">(uses</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">the</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">`production`</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">vhost).</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<h4 id="server-variable-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="serverVariableObject"></a>Server Variable Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">An object representing a Server Variable for server URL template substitution.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-5" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="serverVariableObjectEnum"></a>enum</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">[<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code>]</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">An enumeration of string values to be used if the substitution options are from a limited set.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="serverVariableObjectDefault"></a>default</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The default value to use for substitution, and to send, if an alternate value is <em>not</em> supplied.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="serverVariableObjectDescription"></a>description</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">An optional description for the server variable. <a href="https://spec.commonmark.org/" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">CommonMark syntax</a> MAY be used for rich text representation.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="serverVariableObjectExamples"></a>examples</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">[<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code>]</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">An array of examples of the server variable.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<h5 id="server-variable-object-example" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Server Variable Object Example</h5>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-json rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span>{
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;host&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;rabbitmq.in.mycompany.com:5672&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;pathname&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;/{env}&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;protocol&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;amqp&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">5</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;description&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;RabbitMQ broker. Use the `env` variable to point to either `production` or `staging`.&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">6</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;variables&quot;</span><span>: {
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">7</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;env&quot;</span><span>: {

<h4 id="default-content-type" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="defaultContentTypeString"></a>Default Content Type</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">A string representing the default content type to use when encoding/decoding a message&#x27;s payload. The value MUST be a specific media type (e.g. <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">application/json</code>). This value MUST be used by schema parsers when the <a href="#messageObjectContentType" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">contentType</a> property is omitted.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">In case a message can&#x27;t be encoded/decoded using this value, schema parsers MUST use their default content type.</p>
<h5 id="default-content-type-example" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Default Content Type Example</h5>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-json rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span>{
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;defaultContentType&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;application/json&quot;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span>}</span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-yaml rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-3 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span style="color:#7edcda">defaultContentType:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">application/json</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<h4 id="channels-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="channelsObject"></a>Channels Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">An object containing all the <a href="#channelObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Channel Object</a> definitions the <a href="#definitionsApplication" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Application</a> MUST use during runtime.</p>
<h5 id="patterned-fields-1" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Patterned Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Pattern</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="channelsObjectChannel"></a>{channelId}</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#channelObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Channel Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">An identifier for the described channel. The <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">channelId</code> value is <strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">case-sensitive</strong>. Tools and libraries MAY use the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">channelId</code> to uniquely identify a channel, therefore, it is RECOMMENDED to follow common programming naming conventions.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<h5 id="channels-object-example" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Channels Object Example</h5>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-json rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span>{
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;userSignedUp&quot;</span><span>: {

</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">7</span>      }
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">8</span>    }
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">9</span>  }
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">10</span>}</span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-yaml rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span style="color:#7edcda">userSignedUp:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">address:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&#x27;user.signedup&#x27;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">messages:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">userSignedUp:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">5</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">$ref:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&#x27;#/components/messages/userSignedUp&#x27;</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<h4 id="channel-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="channelObject"></a>Channel Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Describes a shared communication channel.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-6" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="channelObjectAddress"></a>address</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code> | <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">null</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">An optional string representation of this channel&#x27;s address. The address is typically the &quot;topic name&quot;, &quot;routing key&quot;, &quot;event type&quot;, or &quot;path&quot;. When <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">null</code> or absent, it MUST be interpreted as unknown. This is useful when the address is generated dynamically at runtime or can&#x27;t be known upfront. It MAY contain <a href="#channelAddressExpressions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Channel Address Expressions</a>. Query parameters and fragments SHALL NOT be used, instead use <a href="#channelBindingsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">bindings</a> to define them.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="channelObjectMessages"></a>messages</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#messagesObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Messages Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A map of the messages that will be sent to this channel by any application at any time. <strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">Every message sent to this channel MUST be valid against one, and only one, of the <a href="#messageObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">message objects</a> defined in this map.</strong></td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="channelObjectTitle"></a>title</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A human-friendly title for the channel.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="channelObjectSummary"></a>summary</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A short summary of the channel.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="channelObjectDescription"></a>description</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">An optional description of this channel. <a href="https://spec.commonmark.org/" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">CommonMark syntax</a> can be used for rich text representation.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="channelObjectServers"></a>servers</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">[<a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a>]</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">An array of <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">$ref</code> pointers to the definition of the servers in which this channel is available. If the channel is located in the <a href="#channelsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">root Channels Object</a>, it MUST point to a subset of server definitions located in the <a href="#serversObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">root Servers Object</a>, and MUST NOT point to a subset of server definitions located in the <a href="#componentsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Components Object</a> or anywhere else. If the channel is located in the <a href="#componentsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Components Object</a>, it MAY point to a <a href="#serverObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Server Objects</a> in any location. If <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">servers</code> is absent or empty, this channel MUST be available on all the servers defined in the <a href="#serversObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Servers Object</a>. Please note the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">servers</code> property value MUST be an array of <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Objects</a> and, therefore, MUST NOT contain an array of <a href="#serverObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Server Objects</a>. However, it is RECOMMENDED that parsers (or other software) dereference this property for a better development experience.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="channelObjectParameters"></a>parameters</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#parametersObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Parameters Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A map of the parameters included in the channel address. It MUST be present only when the address contains <a href="#channelAddressExpressions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Channel Address Expressions</a>.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="channelObjectTags"></a>tags</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#tagsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Tags Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A list of tags for logical grouping of channels.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="channelObjectExternalDocs"></a>externalDocs</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#externalDocumentationObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">External Documentation Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Additional external documentation for this channel.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="channelObjectBindings"></a>bindings</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#channelBindingsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Channel Bindings Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A map where the keys describe the name of the protocol and the values describe protocol-specific definitions for the channel.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<h5 id="channel-object-example" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Channel Object Example</h5>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-json rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span>{
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;address&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;users.{userId}&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;title&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;Users channel&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;description&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;This channel is used to exchange messages about user events.&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">5</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;messages&quot;</span><span>: {
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">6</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;userSignedUp&quot;</span><span>: {
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">7</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;$ref&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;#/components/messages/userSignedUp&quot;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">8</span>    },
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">9</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;userCompletedOrder&quot;</span><span>: {
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">10</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;$ref&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;#/components/messages/userCompletedOrder&quot;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">11</span>    }
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">12</span>  },
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">13</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;parameters&quot;</span><span>: {
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">14</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;userId&quot;</span><span>: {
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">15</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;$ref&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;#/components/parameters/userId&quot;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">16</span>    }
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">17</span>  },
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">18</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;servers&quot;</span><span>: [

<h4 id="channel-address-expressions" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="channelAddressExpressions"></a>Channel Address Expressions</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Channel addresses MAY contain expressions that can be used to define dynamic values.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Expressions MUST be composed by a name enclosed in curly braces (<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">{</code> and <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">}</code>). E.g., <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">{userId}</code>.</p>
<h4 id="messages-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="messagesObject"></a>Messages Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Describes a map of messages included in a channel.</p>
<h5 id="patterned-fields-2" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Patterned Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Pattern</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messagesObjectId"></a><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">{messageId}</code></td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#messageObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Message Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The key represents the message identifier. The <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">messageId</code> value is <strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">case-sensitive</strong>. Tools and libraries MAY use the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">messageId</code> value to uniquely identify a message, therefore, it is RECOMMENDED to follow common programming naming conventions.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<h5 id="messages-object-example" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Messages Object Example</h5>

</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">userCompletedOrder:</span><span>

<h4 id="operations-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="operationsObject"></a>Operations Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Holds a dictionary with all the <a href="#operationObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">operations</a> this application MUST implement.</p>
<blockquote class=" my-4 border-l-4 border-gray-400 bg-white py-1 pl-4 pr-1 font-body italic text-gray-700 antialiased">
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">If you&#x27;re looking for a place to define operations that MAY or MAY NOT be implemented by the application, consider defining them in <a href="#componentsOperations" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">components/operations</code></a>.</p>
</blockquote>
<h5 id="patterned-fields-3" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Patterned Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Pattern</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationsObjectOperation"></a>{operationId}</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#operationObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Operation Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The operation this application MUST implement. The field name (<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">operationId</code>) MUST be a string used to identify the operation in the document where it is defined, and its value is <strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">case-sensitive</strong>. Tools and libraries MAY use the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">operationId</code> to uniquely identify an operation, therefore, it is RECOMMENDED to follow common programming naming conventions.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
