</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">title:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">User</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">sign</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">up</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">summary:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">Action</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">to</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">sign</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">a</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">user</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">up.</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">description:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">A</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">longer</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">description</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">5</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">channel:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">6</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">$ref:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&#x27;#/channels/userSignup&#x27;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">7</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">action:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">send</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">8</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">tags:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">9</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">-</span><span> </span><span style="color:#7edcda">name:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">user</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">10</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">-</span><span> </span><span style="color:#7edcda">name:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">signup</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">11</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">-</span><span> </span><span style="color:#7edcda">name:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">register</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">12</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">bindings:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">13</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">amqp:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">14</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#7edcda">ack:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">false</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">15</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">traits:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">16</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">-</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">$ref:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&#x27;#/components/operationTraits/kafka&#x27;</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<h4 id="operation-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="operationObject"></a>Operation Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Describes a specific operation.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-7" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationObjectAction"></a>action</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;send&quot;</code> | <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;receive&quot;</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">Required</strong>. Use <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">send</code> when it&#x27;s expected that the application will send a message to the given <a href="#operationObjectChannel" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">channel</code></a>, and <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">receive</code> when the application should expect receiving messages from the given <a href="#operationObjectChannel" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">channel</code></a>.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationObjectChannel"></a>channel</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">Required</strong>. A <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">$ref</code> pointer to the definition of the channel in which this operation is performed. If the operation is located in the <a href="#operationsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">root Operations Object</a>, it MUST point to a channel definition located in the <a href="#channelsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">root Channels Object</a>, and MUST NOT point to a channel definition located in the <a href="#componentsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Components Object</a> or anywhere else. If the operation is located in the <a href="#componentsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Components Object</a>, it MAY point to a <a href="#channelObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Channel Object</a> in any location. Please note the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">channel</code> property value MUST be a <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a> and, therefore, MUST NOT contain a <a href="#channelObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Channel Object</a>. However, it is RECOMMENDED that parsers (or other software) dereference this property for a better development experience.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationObjectTitle"></a>title</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A human-friendly title for the operation.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationObjectSummary"></a>summary</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A short summary of what the operation is about.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationObjectDescription"></a>description</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A verbose explanation of the operation. <a href="http://spec.commonmark.org/" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">CommonMark syntax</a> can be used for rich text representation.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationObjectSecurity"></a>security</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">[<a href="#securitySchemeObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Security Scheme Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a>]</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A declaration of which security schemes are associated with this operation. Only one of the <a href="#securitySchemeObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">security scheme objects</a> MUST be satisfied to authorize an operation. In cases where <a href="#serverObjectSecurity" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Server Security</a> also applies, it MUST also be satisfied.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationObjectTags"></a>tags</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#tagsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Tags Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A list of tags for logical grouping and categorization of operations.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationObjectExternalDocs"></a>externalDocs</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#externalDocumentationObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">External Documentation Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Additional external documentation for this operation.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationObjectBindings"></a>bindings</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#operationBindingsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Operation Bindings Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A map where the keys describe the name of the protocol and the values describe protocol-specific definitions for the operation.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationObjectTraits"></a>traits</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">[<a href="#operationTraitObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Operation Trait Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a> ]</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A list of traits to apply to the operation object. Traits MUST be merged using <a href="#traits-merge-mechanism" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">traits merge mechanism</a>. The resulting object MUST be a valid <a href="#operationObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Operation Object</a>.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationObjectMessages"></a>messages</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">[<a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a>]</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A list of <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">$ref</code> pointers pointing to the supported <a href="#messageObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Message Objects</a> that can be processed by this operation. It MUST contain a subset of the messages defined in the <a href="#operationObjectChannel" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">channel referenced in this operation</a>, and MUST NOT point to a subset of message definitions located in the <a href="#componentsMessages" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Messages Object</a> in the <a href="#componentsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Components Object</a> or anywhere else. <strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">Every message processed by this operation MUST be valid against one, and only one, of the <a href="#messageObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">message objects</a> referenced in this list.</strong> Please note the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">messages</code> property value MUST be a list of <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Objects</a> and, therefore, MUST NOT contain <a href="#messageObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Message Objects</a>. However, it is RECOMMENDED that parsers (or other software) dereference this property for a better development experience.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationObjectReply"></a>reply</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#operationReplyObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Operation Reply Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The definition of the reply in a request-reply operation.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<h5 id="operation-object-example" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Operation Object Example</h5>

</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">12</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">-</span><span> </span><span style="color:#7edcda">name:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">user</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">13</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">-</span><span> </span><span style="color:#7edcda">name:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">signup</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">14</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">-</span><span> </span><span style="color:#7edcda">name:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">register</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">15</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">bindings:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">16</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">amqp:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">17</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">ack:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">false</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">18</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">traits:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">19</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">-</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">$ref:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;#/components/operationTraits/kafka&quot;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">20</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">messages:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">21</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">-</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">$ref:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&#x27;#/components/messages/userSignedUp&#x27;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">22</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">reply:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">23</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">address:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">24</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">location:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&#x27;$message.header#/replyTo&#x27;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">25</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">channel:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">26</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">$ref:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&#x27;#/channels/userSignupReply&#x27;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">27</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">messages:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">28</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">-</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">$ref:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&#x27;#/components/messages/userSignedUpReply&#x27;</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<h4 id="operation-trait-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="operationTraitObject"></a>Operation Trait Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Describes a trait that MAY be applied to an <a href="#operationObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Operation Object</a>. This object MAY contain any property from the <a href="#operationObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Operation Object</a>, except the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">action</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">channel</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">messages</code> and <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">traits</code> ones.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">If you&#x27;re looking to apply traits to a message, see the <a href="#messageTraitObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Message Trait Object</a>.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-8" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationTraitObjectTitle"></a>title</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A human-friendly title for the operation.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationTraitObjectSummary"></a>summary</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A short summary of what the operation is about.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationTraitObjectDescription"></a>description</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A verbose explanation of the operation. <a href="https://spec.commonmark.org/" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">CommonMark syntax</a> can be used for rich text representation.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationTraitObjectSecurity"></a>security</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">[<a href="#securitySchemeObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Security Scheme Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a>]</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A declaration of which security schemes are associated with this operation. Only one of the <a href="#securitySchemeObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">security scheme objects</a> MUST be satisfied to authorize an operation. In cases where <a href="#serverObjectSecurity" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Server Security</a> also applies, it MUST also be satisfied.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationTraitObjectTags"></a>tags</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#tagsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Tags Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A list of tags for logical grouping and categorization of operations.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationTraitObjectExternalDocs"></a>externalDocs</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#externalDocumentationObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">External Documentation Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Additional external documentation for this operation.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationTraitObjectBindings"></a>bindings</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#operationBindingsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Operation Bindings Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A map where the keys describe the name of the protocol and the values describe protocol-specific definitions for the operation.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<h5 id="operation-trait-object-example" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Operation Trait Object Example</h5>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-json rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span>{
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;bindings&quot;</span><span>: {
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;amqp&quot;</span><span>: {
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;ack&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">false</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">5</span>    }
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">6</span>  }
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">7</span>}</span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-yaml rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span style="color:#7edcda">bindings:</span><span>

</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">ack:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">false</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<h4 id="operation-reply-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="operationReplyObject"></a>Operation Reply Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Describes the reply part that MAY be applied to an Operation Object. If an operation implements the request/reply pattern, the reply object represents the response message.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-9" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationReplyObjectAddress"></a>address</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#operationReplyAddressObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Operation Reply Address Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Definition of the address that implementations MUST use for the reply.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationReplyObjectChannel"></a>channel</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">$ref</code> pointer to the definition of the channel in which this operation is performed. When <a href="#operationReplyAddressObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">address</a> is specified, the <a href="#channelObjectAddress" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">address</code> property</a> of the channel referenced by this property MUST be either <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">null</code> or not defined. If the operation reply is located inside a <a href="#operationObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">root Operation Object</a>, it MUST point to a channel definition located in the <a href="#channelsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">root Channels Object</a>, and MUST NOT point to a channel definition located in the <a href="#componentsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Components Object</a> or anywhere else. If the operation reply is located inside an [Operation Object] in the <a href="#componentsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Components Object</a> or in the <a href="#componentsReplies" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Replies Object</a> in the <a href="#componentsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Components Object</a>, it MAY point to a <a href="#channelObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Channel Object</a> in any location. Please note the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">channel</code> property value MUST be a <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a> and, therefore, MUST NOT contain a <a href="#channelObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Channel Object</a>. However, it is RECOMMENDED that parsers (or other software) dereference this property for a better development experience.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="operationReplyObjectMessages"></a>messages</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">[<a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a>]</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A list of <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">$ref</code> pointers pointing to the supported <a href="#messageObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Message Objects</a> that can be processed by this operation as reply. It MUST contain a subset of the messages defined in the <a href="#operationObjectChannel" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">channel referenced in this operation reply</a>, and MUST NOT point to a subset of message definitions located in the <a href="#componentsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Components Object</a> or anywhere else. <strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">Every message processed by this operation MUST be valid against one, and only one, of the <a href="#messageObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">message objects</a> referenced in this list.</strong> Please note the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">messages</code> property value MUST be a list of <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Objects</a> and, therefore, MUST NOT contain <a href="#messageObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Message Objects</a>. However, it is RECOMMENDED that parsers (or other software) dereference this property for a better development experience.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<h4 id="operation-reply-address-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="operationReplyAddressObject"></a>Operation Reply Address Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">An object that specifies where an operation has to send the reply.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">For specifying and computing the location of a reply address, a <a href="#runtimeExpression" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">runtime expression</a> is used.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-10" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:left" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">description</td><td style="text-align:left" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">An optional description of the address. <a href="https://spec.commonmark.org/" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">CommonMark syntax</a> can be used for rich text representation.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">location</td><td style="text-align:left" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED.</strong> A <a href="#runtimeExpression" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">runtime expression</a> that specifies the location of the reply address.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<h5 id="examples-1" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Examples</h5>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-json rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span>{
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;description&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;Consumer inbox&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;location&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;$message.header#/replyTo&quot;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span>}</span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-yaml rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span style="color:#7edcda">description:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">Consumer</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">Inbox</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">location:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">$message.header#/replyTo</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<h4 id="parameters-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="parametersObject"></a>Parameters Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Describes a map of parameters included in a channel address.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This map MUST contain all the parameters used in the parent channel address.</p>
<h5 id="patterned-fields-4" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Patterned Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Pattern</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="parametersObjectName"></a><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">^[A-Za-z0-9_\-]+$</code></td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#parameterObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Parameter Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The key represents the name of the parameter. It MUST match the parameter name used in the parent channel address.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<h5 id="parameters-object-example" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Parameters Object Example</h5>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-json rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span>{
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;address&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;user/{userId}/signedup&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;parameters&quot;</span><span>: {
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;userId&quot;</span><span>: {
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">5</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;description&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;Id of the user.&quot;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">6</span>    }
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">7</span>  }
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">8</span>}</span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-yaml rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span style="color:#7edcda">address:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">user/{userId}/signedup</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">parameters:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">userId:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">description:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">Id</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">of</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">the</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">user.</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<h4 id="parameter-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="parameterObject"></a>Parameter Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Describes a parameter included in a channel address.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-11" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="parameterObjectEnum"></a>enum</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">[<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code>]</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">An enumeration of string values to be used if the substitution options are from a limited set.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="parameterObjectDefault"></a>default</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The default value to use for substitution, and to send, if an alternate value is <em>not</em> supplied.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="parameterObjectDescription"></a>description</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">An optional description for the parameter. <a href="https://spec.commonmark.org/" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">CommonMark syntax</a> MAY be used for rich text representation.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="parameterObjectExamples"></a>examples</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">[<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code>]</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">An array of examples of the parameter value.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="parameterObjectLocation"></a>location</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A <a href="#runtimeExpression" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">runtime expression</a> that specifies the location of the parameter value.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>

</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;address&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;user/{userId}/signedup&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;parameters&quot;</span><span>: {
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;userId&quot;</span><span>: {
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">5</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;description&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;Id of the user.&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">6</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;location&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;$message.payload#/user/id&quot;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">7</span>    }
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">8</span>  }
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">9</span>}</span></code></pre></div></div></div>

</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">parameters:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">userId:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">description:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">Id</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">of</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">the</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">user.</span><span>

<h4 id="server-bindings-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="serverBindingsObject"></a>Server Bindings Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Map describing protocol-specific definitions for a server.</p>
