<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow <h4 id="operation-bindings-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="operationBindingsObject"></a>Operation Bindings Object</h4>

<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<h4 id="message-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="messageObject"></a>Message Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Describes a message received on a given channel and operation.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-16" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageObjectHeaders"></a>headers</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#multiFormatSchemaObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Multi Format Schema Object</a> | <a href="#schemaObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Schema Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Schema definition of the application headers. Schema MUST be a map of key-value pairs. It <strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">MUST NOT</strong> define the protocol headers. If this is a <a href="#schemaObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Schema Object</a>, then the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">schemaFormat</code> will be assumed to be &quot;application/vnd.aai.asyncapi+json;version=<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">asyncapi</code>&quot; where the version is equal to the <a href="#A2SVersionString" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">AsyncAPI Version String</a>.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageObjectPayload"></a>payload</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#multiFormatSchemaObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Multi Format Schema Object</a> | <a href="#schemaObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Schema Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Definition of the message payload. If this is a <a href="#schemaObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Schema Object</a>, then the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">schemaFormat</code> will be assumed to be &quot;application/vnd.aai.asyncapi+json;version=<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">asyncapi</code>&quot; where the version is equal to the <a href="#A2SVersionString" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">AsyncAPI Version String</a>.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageObjectCorrelationId"></a>correlationId</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#correlationIdObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Correlation ID Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Definition of the correlation ID used for message tracing or matching.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageObjectContentType"></a>contentType</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The content type to use when encoding/decoding a message&#x27;s payload. The value MUST be a specific media type (e.g. <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">application/json</code>). When omitted, the value MUST be the one specified on the <a href="#defaultContentTypeString" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">defaultContentType</a> field.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageObjectName"></a>name</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A machine-friendly name for the message.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageObjectTitle"></a>title</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A human-friendly title for the message.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageObjectSummary"></a>summary</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A short summary of what the message is about.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageObjectDescription"></a>description</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A verbose explanation of the message. <a href="https://spec.commonmark.org/" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">CommonMark syntax</a> can be used for rich text representation.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageObjectTags"></a>tags</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#tagsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Tags Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A list of tags for logical grouping and categorization of messages.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageObjectExternalDocs"></a>externalDocs</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#externalDocumentationObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">External Documentation Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Additional external documentation for this message.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageObjectBindings"></a>bindings</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#messageBindingsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Message Bindings Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A map where the keys describe the name of the protocol and the values describe protocol-specific definitions for the message.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageObjectExamples"></a>examples</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">[<a href="#messageExampleObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Message Example Object</a>]</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">List of examples.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageObjectTraits"></a>traits</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">[<a href="#messageTraitObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Message Trait Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a>]</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A list of traits to apply to the message object. Traits MUST be merged using <a href="#traits-merge-mechanism" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">traits merge mechanism</a>. The resulting object MUST be a valid <a href="#messageObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Message Object</a>.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>

<h4 id="message-trait-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="messageTraitObject"></a>Message Trait Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Describes a trait that MAY be applied to a <a href="#messageObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Message Object</a>. This object MAY contain any property from the <a href="#messageObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Message Object</a>, except <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">payload</code> and <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">traits</code>.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">If you&#x27;re looking to apply traits to an operation, see the <a href="#operationTraitObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Operation Trait Object</a>.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-17" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageTraitObjectHeaders"></a>headers</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#multiFormatSchemaObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Multi Format Schema Object</a> | <a href="#schemaObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Schema Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Schema definition of the application headers. Schema MUST be a map of key-value pairs. It <strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">MUST NOT</strong> define the protocol headers. If this is a <a href="#schemaObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Schema Object</a>, then the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">schemaFormat</code> will be assumed to be &quot;application/vnd.aai.asyncapi+json;version=<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">asyncapi</code>&quot; where the version is equal to the <a href="#A2SVersionString" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">AsyncAPI Version String</a>.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageTraitObjectCorrelationId"></a>correlationId</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#correlationIdObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Correlation ID Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Definition of the correlation ID used for message tracing or matching.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageTraitObjectContentType"></a>contentType</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The content type to use when encoding/decoding a message&#x27;s payload. The value MUST be a specific media type (e.g. <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">application/json</code>). When omitted, the value MUST be the one specified on the <a href="#defaultContentTypeString" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">defaultContentType</a> field.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageTraitObjectName"></a>name</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A machine-friendly name for the message.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageTraitObjectTitle"></a>title</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A human-friendly title for the message.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageTraitObjectSummary"></a>summary</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A short summary of what the message is about.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageTraitObjectDescription"></a>description</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A verbose explanation of the message. <a href="https://spec.commonmark.org/" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">CommonMark syntax</a> can be used for rich text representation.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageTraitObjectTags"></a>tags</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#tagsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Tags Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A list of tags for logical grouping and categorization of messages.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageTraitObjectExternalDocs"></a>externalDocs</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#externalDocumentationObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">External Documentation Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Additional external documentation for this message.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageTraitObjectBindings"></a>bindings</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#messageBindingsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Message Bindings Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A map where the keys describe the name of the protocol and the values describe protocol-specific definitions for the message.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageTraitObjectExamples"></a>examples</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">[<a href="#messageExampleObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Message Example Object</a>]</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">List of examples.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>

              ml-3 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span style="color:#7edcda">contentType:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">application/json</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<h4 id="-message-example-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="messageExampleObject"></a> Message Example Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Message Example Object represents an example of a <a href="#messageObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Message Object</a> and MUST contain either <strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">headers</strong> and/or <strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">payload</strong> fields.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-18" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageExampleObjectHeaders"></a>headers</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">Map[string, any]</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The value of this field MUST validate against the <a href="#messageObjectHeaders" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Message Object&#x27;s headers</a> field.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageExampleObjectPayload"></a>payload</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">any</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The value of this field MUST validate against the <a href="#messageObjectPayload" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Message Object&#x27;s payload</a> field.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageExampleObjectName"></a>name</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A machine-friendly name.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="messageExampleObjectSummary"></a>summary</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A short summary of what the example is about.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>

</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">15</span>  }
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">16</span>}</span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-yaml rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span style="color:#7edcda">name:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">SimpleSignup</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">summary:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">A</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">simple</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">UserSignup</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">example</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">message</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">headers:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">correlationId:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">my-correlation-id</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">5</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">applicationInstanceId:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">myInstanceId</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">6</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">payload:</span><span>

</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">8</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">someUserKey:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">someUserValue</span><span>

<h4 id="tags-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="tagsObject"></a>Tags Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">A Tags object is a list of <a href="#tagObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Tag Objects</a>. An <a href="#tagObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Tag Object</a> in a list can be referenced by <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a>.</p>
<h4 id="tag-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="tagObject"></a>Tag Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Allows adding meta data to a single tag.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-19" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="tagObjectName"></a>name</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED.</strong> The name of the tag.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="tagObjectDescription"></a>description</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A short description for the tag. <a href="https://spec.commonmark.org/" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">CommonMark syntax</a> can be used for rich text representation.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="tagObjectExternalDocs"></a>externalDocs</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#externalDocumentationObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">External Documentation Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Additional external documentation for this tag.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<h5 id="tag-object-example" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Tag Object Example</h5>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-json rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span>{
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span> </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;name&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;user&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span> </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;description&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;User-related messages&quot;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span>}</span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-yaml rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span style="color:#7edcda">name:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">user</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">description:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">User-related</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">messages</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<h4 id="external-documentation-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="externalDocumentationObject"></a>External Documentation Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Allows referencing an external resource for extended documentation.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-20" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="externalDocDescription"></a>description</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A short description of the target documentation. <a href="https://spec.commonmark.org/" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">CommonMark syntax</a> can be used for rich text representation.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="externalDocUrl"></a>url</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED.</strong> The URL for the target documentation. This MUST be in the form of an absolute URL.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<h5 id="external-documentation-object-example" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">External Documentation Object Example</h5>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-json rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span>{
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;description&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;Find more info here&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;url&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;https://example.com&quot;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span>}</span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-yaml rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span style="color:#7edcda">description:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">Find</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">more</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">info</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">here</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">url:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">https://example.com</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<h4 id="reference-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="referenceObject"></a>Reference Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">A simple object to allow referencing other components in the specification, internally and externally.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">The Reference Object is defined by <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-pbryan-zyp-json-ref-03" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">JSON Reference</a> and follows the same structure, behavior and rules. A JSON Reference SHALL only be used to refer to a schema that is formatted in either JSON or YAML. In the case of a YAML-formatted Schema, the JSON Reference SHALL be applied to the JSON representation of that schema. The JSON representation SHALL be made by applying the conversion described <a href="#format" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">here</a>.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">For this specification, reference resolution is done as defined by the JSON Reference specification and not by the JSON Schema specification.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-21" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="referenceRef"></a>$ref</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED.</strong> The reference string.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object cannot be extended with additional properties and any properties added SHALL be ignored.</p>
<h5 id="reference-object-example" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Reference Object Example</h5>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-json rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span>{
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;$ref&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;#/components/schemas/Pet&quot;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span>}</span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-yaml rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-3 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span>  </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">$ref:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&#x27;#/components/schemas/Pet&#x27;</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<h4 id="components-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="componentsObject"></a>Components Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Holds a set of reusable objects for different aspects of the AsyncAPI specification.
All objects defined within the components object will have no effect on the API unless they are explicitly referenced from properties outside the components object.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-22" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow <p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">All the fixed fields declared above are objects that MUST use keys that match the regular expression: <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">^[a-zA-Z0-9\.\-_]+$</code>.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Field Name Examples:</p>

<h4 id="multi-format-schema-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="multiFormatSchemaObject"></a>Multi Format Schema Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">The Multi Format Schema Object represents a schema definition. It differs from the <a href="#schemaObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Schema Object</a> in that it supports multiple schema formats or languages (e.g., JSON Schema, Avro, etc.).</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-23" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="multiFormatSchemaObjectSchemaFormat"></a>schemaFormat</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">Required</strong>. A string containing the name of the schema format that is used to define the information. If <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">schemaFormat</code> is missing, it MUST default to <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">application/vnd.aai.asyncapi+json;version={{asyncapi}}</code> where <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">{{asyncapi}}</code> matches the <a href="#A2SVersionString" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">AsyncAPI Version String</a>. In such a case, this would make the Multi Format Schema Object equivalent to the <a href="#schemaObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Schema Object</a>. When using <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a> within the schema, the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">schemaFormat</code> of the resource being referenced MUST match the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">schemaFormat</code> of the schema that contains the initial reference. For example, if you reference Avro <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">schema</code>, then <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">schemaFormat</code> of referencing resource and the resource being reference MUST match. <br/><br/>Check out the <a href="#multiFormatSchemaFormatTable" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">supported schema formats table</a> for more information. Custom values are allowed but their implementation is OPTIONAL. A custom value MUST NOT refer to one of the schema formats listed in the <a href="#multiFormatSchemaFormatTable" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">table</a>.<br/><br/>When using <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Objects</a> within the schema, the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">schemaFormat</code> of the referenced resource MUST match the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">schemaFormat</code> of the schema containing the reference.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="multiFormatSchemaObjectSchema"></a>schema</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">any</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">Required</strong>. Definition of the message payload. It can be of any type but defaults to <a href="#schemaObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Schema Object</a>. It MUST match the schema format defined in <a href="#multiFormatSchemaObjectSchemaFormat" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">schemaFormat</code></a>, including the encoding type. E.g., Avro should be inlined as either a YAML or JSON object instead of as a string to be parsed as YAML or JSON. Non-JSON-based schemas (e.g., Protobuf or XSD) MUST be inlined as a string.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<h5 id="schema-formats-table" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased"><a name="multiFormatSchemaFormatTable"></a>Schema formats table</h5>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">The following table contains a set of values that every implementation MUST support.</p>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Allowed values</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Notes</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#schemaObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">AsyncAPI 3.0.0 Schema Object</a></td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">application/vnd.aai.asyncapi;version=3.0.0</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">application/vnd.aai.asyncapi+json;version=3.0.0</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">application/vnd.aai.asyncapi+yaml;version=3.0.0</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">This is the default when a <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">schemaFormat</code> is not provided.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="https://json-schema.org/specification-links.html#draft-7" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">JSON Schema Draft 07</a></td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">application/schema+json;version=draft-07</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">application/schema+yaml;version=draft-07</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"></td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">The following table contains a set of values that every implementation is RECOMMENDED to support.</p>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Allowed values</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Notes</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="https://avro.apache.org/docs/1.9.0/spec.html#schemas" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Avro 1.9.0 schema</a></td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">OpenAPI 3.0.0 Schema Object</a></td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-800">application/vnd.oai.openapi+yaml;version=3.0.0</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"></td></tr><tr class="
