<h5 id="multi-format-schema-object-examples" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Multi Format Schema Object Examples</h5>
<h6 id="multi-format-schema-object-example-with-avro" class=" my-4 font-heading text-sm font-bold uppercase text-gray-900 antialiased">Multi Format Schema Object Example with Avro</h6>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-yaml rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span style="color:#7edcda">channels:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">example:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">messages:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#7edcda">myMessage:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">5</span><span>        </span><span style="color:#7edcda">payload:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">6</span><span>          </span><span style="color:#7edcda">schemaFormat:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&#x27;application/vnd.apache.avro;version=1.9.0&#x27;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">7</span><span>          </span><span style="color:#7edcda">schema:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">8</span><span>            </span><span style="color:#7edcda">type:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">record</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">9</span><span>            </span><span style="color:#7edcda">name:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">User</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">10</span><span>            </span><span style="color:#7edcda">namespace:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">com.company</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">11</span><span>            </span><span style="color:#7edcda">doc:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">User</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">information</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">12</span><span>            </span><span style="color:#7edcda">fields:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">13</span><span>              </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">-</span><span> </span><span style="color:#7edcda">name:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">displayName</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">14</span><span>                </span><span style="color:#7edcda">type:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">string</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">15</span><span>              </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">-</span><span> </span><span style="color:#7edcda">name:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">age</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">16</span><span>                </span><span style="color:#7edcda">type:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">int</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<h4 id="schema-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="schemaObject"></a>Schema Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">The Schema Object allows the definition of input and output data types.
These types can be objects, but also primitives and arrays. This object is a superset of the <a href="https://json-schema.org/" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">JSON Schema Specification Draft 07</a>. The empty schema (which allows any instance to validate) MAY be represented by the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">boolean</code> value <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">true</code> and a schema which allows no instance to validate MAY be represented by the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">boolean</code> value <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">false</code>.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Further information about the properties can be found in <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-handrews-json-schema-01" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">JSON Schema Core</a> and <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-handrews-json-schema-validation-01" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">JSON Schema Validation</a>.
Unless stated otherwise, the property definitions follow the JSON Schema specification as referenced here. For other formats (e.g., Avro, RAML, etc) see <a href="#multiFormatSchemaObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Multi Format Schema Object</a>.</p>
<h5 id="properties" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Properties</h5>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">The AsyncAPI Schema Object is a JSON Schema vocabulary which extends JSON Schema Core and Validation vocabularies. As such, any keyword available for those vocabularies is by definition available in AsyncAPI, and will work the exact same way, including but not limited to:</p>
<ul class=" font-normal my-4 ml-4 list-disc font-body text-gray-700 antialiased">
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">title</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">type</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">required</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">multipleOf</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">maximum</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">exclusiveMaximum</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">minimum</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">exclusiveMinimum</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">maxLength</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">minLength</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">pattern (This string SHOULD be a valid regular expression, according to the <a href="https://www.ecma-international.org/ecma-262/5.1/#sec-7.8.5" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">ECMA 262 regular expression</a> dialect)</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">maxItems</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">minItems</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">uniqueItems</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">maxProperties</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">minProperties</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">enum</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">const</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">examples</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">if / then / else</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">readOnly</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">writeOnly</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">properties</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">patternProperties</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">additionalProperties</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">additionalItems</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">items</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">propertyNames</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">contains</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">allOf</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">oneOf</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">anyOf</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">not</li>
</ul>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">The following properties are taken from the JSON Schema definition but their definitions were adjusted to the AsyncAPI Specification.</p>
<ul class=" font-normal my-4 ml-4 list-disc font-body text-gray-700 antialiased">
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">description - <a href="https://spec.commonmark.org/" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">CommonMark syntax</a> can be used for rich text representation.</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">format - See <a href="#dataTypeFormat" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Data Type Formats</a> for further details. While relying on JSON Schema&#x27;s defined formats, the AsyncAPI Specification offers a few additional predefined formats.</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">default - Use it to specify that property has a predefined value if no other value is present. Unlike JSON Schema, the value MUST conform to the defined type for the Schema Object defined at the same level. For example, of <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">type</code> is <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code>, then <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">default</code> can be <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;foo&quot;</code> but cannot be <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">1</code>.</li>
</ul>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Alternatively, any time a Schema Object can be used, a <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a> can be used in its place. This allows referencing definitions in place of defining them inline. It is appropriate to clarify that the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">$ref</code> keyword MUST follow the behavior described by <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a> instead of the one in <a href="https://json-schema.org/understanding-json-schema/structuring.html#ref" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">JSON Schema definition</a>.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">In addition to the JSON Schema fields, the following AsyncAPI vocabulary fields MAY be used for further schema documentation:</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-24" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="schemaObjectDiscriminator"></a>discriminator</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Adds support for polymorphism. The discriminator is the schema property name that is used to differentiate between other schema that inherit this schema. The property name used MUST be defined at this schema and it MUST be in the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">required</code> property list. When used, the value MUST be the name of this schema or any schema that inherits it. See <a href="#schemaComposition" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Composition and Inheritance</a> for more details.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="schemaObjectExternalDocs"></a>externalDocs</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#externalDocumentationObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">External Documentation Object</a> | <a href="#referenceObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Reference Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Additional external documentation for this schema.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="schemaObjectDeprecated"></a> deprecated</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">boolean</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Specifies that a schema is deprecated and SHOULD be transitioned out of usage. Default value is <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">false</code>.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<h6 id="composition-and-inheritance-polymorphism" class=" my-4 font-heading text-sm font-bold uppercase text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="schemaComposition"></a>Composition and Inheritance (Polymorphism)</h6>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">The AsyncAPI Specification allows combining and extending model definitions using the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">allOf</code> property of JSON Schema, in effect offering model composition.
<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">allOf</code> takes in an array of object definitions that are validated <em>independently</em> but together compose a single object.</p>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">While composition offers model extensibility, it does not imply a hierarchy between the models.
To support polymorphism, AsyncAPI Specification adds the support of the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">discriminator</code> field.
When used, the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">discriminator</code> will be the name of the property used to decide which schema definition is used to validate the structure of the model.
As such, the <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">discriminator</code> field MUST be a required field.
There are two ways to define the value of a discriminator for an inheriting instance.</p>
<ul class=" font-normal my-4 ml-4 list-disc font-body text-gray-700 antialiased">
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">Use the schema&#x27;s name.</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">Override the schema&#x27;s name by overriding the property with a new value. If exists, this takes precedence over the schema&#x27;s name.</li>
</ul>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">As such, inline schema definitions, which do not have a given id, <em>cannot</em> be used in polymorphism.</p>
<h5 id="schema-object-examples" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Schema Object Examples</h5>
<h6 id="primitive-sample" class=" my-4 font-heading text-sm font-bold uppercase text-gray-900 antialiased">Primitive Sample</h6>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-json rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span>{
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;type&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;string&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;format&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;email&quot;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span>}</span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-yaml rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span style="color:#7edcda">type:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">string</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">format:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">email</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<h6 id="simple-model" class=" my-4 font-heading text-sm font-bold uppercase text-gray-900 antialiased">Simple Model</h6>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-json rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual
              ml-0 text-xs" style="display:inline-block;background:#252f3f;color:#c0e2a3"><code class="mr-8" style="white-space:pre"><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">1</span><span>{
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">2</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;type&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;object&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">3</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;required&quot;</span><span>: [
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">4</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;name&quot;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">5</span>  ],
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">6</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;properties&quot;</span><span>: {
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">7</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;name&quot;</span><span>: {
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">8</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;type&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;string&quot;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">9</span>    },
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">10</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;address&quot;</span><span>: {
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">11</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;$ref&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;#/components/schemas/Address&quot;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">12</span>    },
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">13</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;age&quot;</span><span>: {
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">14</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;type&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;integer&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">15</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;format&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&quot;int32&quot;</span><span>,
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">16</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#7edcda">&quot;minimum&quot;</span><span>: </span><span style="color:#d8da68">0</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">17</span>    }
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">18</span>  }
</span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">19</span>}</span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<div class="relative z-10 my-8 max-w-full overflow-auto rounded bg-code-editor-dark pt-2 language-yaml rounded"><div class="z-10"><button class="absolute right-2 top-1 z-50 cursor-pointer bg-code-editor-dark text-xs text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-300 focus:outline-none" title="Copy to clipboard" data-test="copy-button"><output class="sr-only" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></output><span class="relative inline-block mt-1 size-4" aria-hidden="true"><svg class="h-full w-full" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 20 20"><path d="M15.6 2l-1.2 3H5.6L4.4 2C3.629 2 3 2.629 3 3.4v15.2c0 .77.629 1.4 1.399 1.4h11.2c.77 0 1.4-.631 1.4-1.4V3.4C17 2.629 16.369 2 15.6 2zm-2 2l.9-2h-2.181L11.6 0H8.4l-.72 2H5.5l.899 2H13.6z"></path></svg></span></button></div><div class="h-full max-h-screen"><div class="relative overflow-y-auto pr-8 "><pre class="pb-2 pt-px text-sm font-medium font-ligatures-contextual

</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">38</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#7edcda">properties:</span><span>

</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">42</span><span>          </span><span style="color:#7edcda">description:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">the</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">size</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">of</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">the</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">pack</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">the</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">dog</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">is</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">from</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">43</span><span>          </span><span style="color:#7edcda">minimum:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#d8da68">0</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">44</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#7edcda">required:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">45</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">-</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">packSize</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">46</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#797f8c">## applies to instances with `petType: &quot;StickBug&quot;`</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">47</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#797f8c">## because that is the required value of the discriminator field,</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">48</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#797f8c">## overriding the schema name</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">49</span><span>  </span><span style="color:#7edcda">StickInsect:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">50</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">description:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">A</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">representation</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">of</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">an</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">Australian</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">walking</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">stick</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">51</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#7edcda">allOf:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">52</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">-</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">$ref:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">&#x27;#/components/schemas/Pet&#x27;</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">53</span><span>    </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">-</span><span> </span><span style="color:#7edcda">type:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">object</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">54</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#7edcda">properties:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">55</span><span>        </span><span style="color:#7edcda">petType:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">56</span><span>          </span><span style="color:#7edcda">const:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">StickBug</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">57</span><span>        </span><span style="color:#7edcda">color:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">58</span><span>          </span><span style="color:#7edcda">type:</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">string</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">59</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#7edcda">required:</span><span>
</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">60</span><span>      </span><span style="color:#64a0dc">-</span><span> </span><span style="color:#c0e2a3;font-weight:500">color</span></span></code></pre></div></div></div>
<h4 id="security-scheme-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="securitySchemeObject"></a>Security Scheme Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Defines a security scheme that can be used by the operations. Supported schemes are:</p>
<ul class=" font-normal my-4 ml-4 list-disc font-body text-gray-700 antialiased">
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">User/Password.</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">API key (either as user or as password).</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">X.509 certificate.</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">End-to-end encryption (either symmetric or asymmetric).</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">HTTP authentication.</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">HTTP API key.</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">OAuth2&#x27;s common flows (Implicit, Resource Owner Protected Credentials, Client Credentials and Authorization Code) as defined in <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6749" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">RFC6749</a>.</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased"><a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/draft-ietf-oauth-discovery-06" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">OpenID Connect Discovery</a>.</li>
<li class=" my-3 font-body font-regular tracking-tight text-gray-700 antialiased">SASL (Simple Authentication and Security Layer) as defined in <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc4422" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">RFC4422</a>.</li>
</ul>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-25" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Applies To</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="securitySchemeObjectType"></a>type</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Any</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED</strong>. The type of the security scheme. Valid values are <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;userPassword&quot;</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;apiKey&quot;</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;X509&quot;</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;symmetricEncryption&quot;</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;asymmetricEncryption&quot;</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;httpApiKey&quot;</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;http&quot;</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;oauth2&quot;</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;openIdConnect&quot;</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;plain&quot;</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;scramSha256&quot;</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;scramSha512&quot;</code>, and <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;gssapi&quot;</code>.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="securitySchemeObjectDescription"></a>description</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Any</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A short description for security scheme. <a href="https://spec.commonmark.org/" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">CommonMark syntax</a> MAY be used for rich text representation.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="securitySchemeObjectName"></a>name</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">httpApiKey</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED</strong>. The name of the header, query or cookie parameter to be used.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="securitySchemeObjectIn"></a>in</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">apiKey</code> | <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">httpApiKey</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED</strong>. The location of the API key. Valid values are <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;user&quot;</code> and <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;password&quot;</code> for <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">apiKey</code> and <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;query&quot;</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;header&quot;</code> or <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;cookie&quot;</code> for <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">httpApiKey</code>.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="securitySchemeObjectScheme"></a>scheme</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">http</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED</strong>. The name of the HTTP Authorization scheme to be used in the <a href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7235#section-5.1" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Authorization header as defined in RFC7235</a>.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="securitySchemeObjectBearerFormat"></a>bearerFormat</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">http</code> (<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;bearer&quot;</code>)</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">A hint to the client to identify how the bearer token is formatted.  Bearer tokens are usually generated by an authorization server, so this information is primarily for documentation purposes.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="securitySchemeFlows"></a>flows</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#oauthFlowsObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">OAuth Flows Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">oauth2</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED</strong>. An object containing configuration information for the flow types supported.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="securitySchemeOpenIdConnectUrl"></a>openIdConnectUrl</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">openIdConnect</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED</strong>. OpenId Connect URL to discover OAuth2 configuration values. This MUST be in the form of an absolute URL.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="securitySchemeScopes"></a>scopes</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">[<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code>]</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">oauth2</code> | <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">openIdConnect</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">List of the needed scope names. An empty array means no scopes are needed.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<h5 id="security-scheme-object-example" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Security Scheme Object Example</h5>
<h6 id="userpassword-authentication-sample" class=" my-4 font-heading text-sm font-bold uppercase text-gray-900 antialiased">User/Password Authentication Sample</h6>

</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:2.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">14</span>  ]

</span></span><span style="padding-right:2rem"><span class="comment linenumber react-syntax-highlighter-line-number" style="display:inline-block;min-width:1.25em;padding-right:16px;text-align:right;user-select:none;margin-left:16px;background-color:#252f3f;color:#8B9394">8</span><span></span><span style="color:#7edcda">scopes:</span><span>

<h4 id="oauth-flows-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="oauthFlowsObject"></a>OAuth Flows Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Allows configuration of the supported OAuth Flows.</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-26" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider name="oauthFlowsImplicit"></a>implicit</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#oauthFlowObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">OAuth Flow Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Configuration for the OAuth Implicit flow.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="oauthFlowsPassword"></a>password</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight Flow Object</a></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Configuration for the OAuth Resource Owner Protected Credentials flow.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="oauthFlowsClientCredentials"></a>clientCredentials</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a href="#oauthFlowObject" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold tracking-tight text-gray-700">Configuration for the OAuth Client Credentials flow.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight <p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
<h4 id="oauth-flow-object" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-medium text-gray-900 antialiased"><a name="oauthFlowObject"></a>OAuth Flow Object</h4>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">Configuration details for a supported OAuth Flow</p>
<h5 id="fixed-fields-27" class=" text-md my-4 font-heading font-bold antialiased">Fixed Fields</h5>
<div class=" flex flex-col"><div class="my-2 overflow-x-auto py-2 sm:-mx-6 sm:px-6 lg:-mx-8 lg:px-8"><div class="inline-block w-full overflow-auto border-b border-gray-200 align-middle shadow sm:rounded-lg"><table class=" w-full"><thead><tr class=" bg-white"><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Field Name</th><th style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Type</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Applies To</th><th class=" border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-100 px-6 py-3 text-left font-body text-xs font-medium uppercase leading-4 tracking-wider text-gray-900">Description</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="oauthFlowAuthorizationUrl"></a>authorizationUrl</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">oauth2</code> (<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;implicit&quot;</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;authorizationCode&quot;</code>)</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED</strong>. The authorization URL to be used for this flow. This MUST be in the form of an absolute URL.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="oauthFlowTokenUrl"></a>tokenUrl</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">oauth2</code> (<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;password&quot;</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;clientCredentials&quot;</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">&quot;authorizationCode&quot;</code>)</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED</strong>. The token URL to be used for this flow. This MUST be in the form of an absolute URL.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="oauthFlowRefreshUrl"></a>refreshUrl</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">oauth2</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">The URL to be used for obtaining refresh tokens. This MUST be in the form of an absolute URL.</td></tr><tr class=" bg-white"><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><a name="oauthFlowScopes"></a>availableScopes</td><td style="text-align:center" class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700">Map[<code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code>, <code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">string</code>]</td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><code class=" rounded bg-gray-200 px-1 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-gray-800">oauth2</code></td><td class=" border-b border-gray-200 px-6 py-4 text-sm leading-5 tracking-tight text-gray-700"><strong class=" my-4 font-body font-semibold text-gray-800 antialiased">REQUIRED</strong>. The available scopes for the OAuth2 security scheme. A map between the scope name and a short description for it.</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div>
<p class=" my-4 font-body font-regular text-gray-700 antialiased">This object MAY be extended with <a href="#specificationExtensions" class="border-b border-secondary-400 font-semibold text-gray-900 transition duration-300 ease-in-out hover:border-secondary-500 font-body antialiased">Specification Extensions</a>.</p>
